summary: Iteration 42: Unified Availability System - All features tested and working. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements functional.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/availability-unified/program/{id}/slots returns slots with detailed status (available, booked, blocked_exception, blocked_parallel, etc.)
VERIFIED: Exception blocks slot - after creating exception, slot status changes from 'available' to 'blocked_exception'
VERIFIED: Exception check integrated into check_booking_collision - booking creation blocked when program has exception
VERIFIED: Exception check integrated into check_lecturer_collision_for_assignment
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Unified Availability page loads with auto-selected first program
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Weekly calendar shows color-coded slots (green=available, orange=parallel block, red=exception)
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Click available slot → exception dialog → create exception → slot turns red
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Click blocked_exception slot → restore dialog → delete exception → slot turns green
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Program/Personal toggle switches between views
VERIFIED: Collision tab in ProgramsPage still works (not removed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Availability System fully implemented and tested. Route prefix is /api/availability-unified. Program 'Čteme obrazy' (128d6178-e199-4cc5-b247-0e42fe1955d7) returns 2 slots per weekday (09:00-10:00, 09:30-10:30). The availability_exceptions table stores one-off blocks. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Collision tab in ProgramsPage preserved.

verified_features.feature: GET /api/availability-unified/program/{id}/slots?date= returns slots with detailed status
verified_features.evidence: API returns {program_id, date, slots: [{time, status, reason}]}
Returns created exception with id, scope_type, scope_id, date, start_time, end_time, reason

verified_features.feature: Exception blocks slot: after creating exception, slot status changes to 'blocked_exception'
Admin UI: Unified Availability page loads with auto-selected first program

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Weekly calendar shows color-coded slots
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows green (available), orange (parallel block) slots

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Click available slot → exception dialog → create exception → slot turns red
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Uzavřít slot' dialog with reason input and 'Uzavřít' button

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Click blocked_exception slot → restore dialog → delete exception → slot turns green
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Obnovit dostupnost' dialog with 'Obnovit dostupnost' button

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Program/Personal toggle switches between views
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Programová'/'Osobní' toggle buttons, lecturer selector appears in Personal view

verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows Kolize tab with Paralelní provoz, Lektor, Místnost options
